fact_nuggets.text: Grim Neigh (Japanese: Black Neigh) is an Ability introduced during Generation VIII, in The Crown Tundra. It is the signature Ability of Spectrier.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Grim Neigh directly causes another Pokemon (including allies) to faint by using a damaging move, its Special Attack is increased by one stage. If its Special Attack is already at +6 stages, Grim Neigh will not activate. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Grim Neigh has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Grim Neigh directly causes another Pokemon (including allies) to faint by using a damaging move, its Special Attack is increased by one stage. If its Special Attack is already at +6 stages, Grim Neigh will not activate.
Boosts Special Attack after knocking out a Pokemon.
